import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv('/tmp/tmph3syp91b_16038286.csv')
n_i = df[df['cites_refs'] == False].shape[0]
n_j = df[df['cites_refs'] == True].shape[0]
n_k = 0
D = (n_i - n_j) / (n_i + n_j + n_k)
print(f"D_INDEX = {D}")
print(f"n_i = {n_i}, n_j = {n_j}, n_k = {n_k}")
results.title: International Organizations and Higher Education Policy: Thinking Globally, Acting Locally?

results.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv('/tmp/tmptw79jhyu_15709470.csv')
n_j = df['cites_refs'].sum()
n_i = len(df) - n_j
n_k = 0
D = (n_i - n_j) / (n_i + n_j + n_k)
print(f"D_INDEX = {D}")
print(f"n_i = {n_i}, n_j = {n_j}, n_k = {n_k}")
results.title: Tort reform by contract
